sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh aw kong it hi, kei aa na hi ta
Nangma hang mawhna nuam namcin ka khia ta
Keimah hong
Tanpa hong Honpa Na hi ta
Kong it ngei leh zong, tu’n kong it pha sem
ta.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tun’ Nang kong it hang Nang mah’n Nong it masa
Nong it ma’n
singlamteh tung Nong tan zo ta
Ling lukhu na tal tung-ah ki khen zo ta
Kong it ngei leh zong
tu’n kong it pha sem ta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong it tawntung ning hin’na sihna sung-ah
Hong
phat tawntung ning hu Nong kop lai in ah
Sihna daitui ka tal ah kai ciangin ah
Kong it ngei leh
zong tu’n kong it pha sem ta

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nuamsak tawntungna minthang innpi sungah
Na min
hong phat tawntung ning a taang van ah
Zawhna lukhute khu in sa ning hih mah
Kong it ngei leh zong
tu’n kong it pha sem taKey : F
